2605.02466.title: ATLAS: Article Tracking, Linking, and Analysis of Swedish Encyclopedias
2605.02466.paper_summary: The digitization of old encyclopedias represents an important step to improve access to historically structured knowledge. Often, however, this process does not go beyond an optical character recognition, leaving all the underlying structure unexploited. In addition, many encyclopedias had multiple editions reflecting the evolution of knowledge. The lack of structure in the raw text makes it difficult to track changes across these editions. In this work, we built a pipeline to restore the text structure, where we extract the headwords and identify entries; categorize the entities; match entries across editions; and link entries to a Wikidata item. We applied this pipeline to the four major editions of \textit{Nordisk familjebok}, an authoritative Swedish encyclopedia published between 1876 and 1951. We could extract the headwords with an F1 score of 97.8\% and we obtained an F1 score of 93.4\% on the headword classification. On a small-scale evaluation, we reached a 93\% precision on the cross-edition matching, 85\% precision and 16.5\% recall on the Wikidata linking. This shows that an automated approach to digitized historical knowledge is possible. This should facilitate the preservation of general knowledge and the understanding of knowledge transmission. The datasets and programs are available online.
2605.02466.paper_summary_zh: 舊百科全書的數位化代表著改善對歷史結構知識的訪問的重要一步。 然而，這一過程往往僅限於光學字符識別，未能充分利用所有潛在的結構。此外，許多百科全書有多個版本，反映了知識的演變。 原始文本中缺乏結構使得追蹤這些版本之間的變化變得困難。在這項工作中，我們建立了一個管道來恢復文本結構，其中我們提取了標題詞並識別條目；對實體進行分類；跨版本匹配條目；並將條目鏈接到Wikidata項目。我們將這個管道應用於四個主要版本的\textit{Nordisk familjebok}，這是一部於1876年至1951年間出版的權威瑞典百科全書。我們能夠以97.8\%的F1分數提取標題詞，並在標題詞分類上獲得93.4\%的F1分數。在小規模評估中，我們在跨版本匹配上達到了93\%的精確度，在Wikidata鏈接上達到了85\%的精確度和16.5\%的召回率。這顯示出對數位化歷史知識的自動化方法是可行的。這應該有助於保護一般知識和理解知識傳遞。數據集和程序在線上可用。
2605.02466.author: Albin Andersson et.al.
2605.02466.authors: Albin Andersson, Salam Jonasson, Fredrik Wastring, Pierre Nugues
